message:
style(tests): apply rustfmt formatting to test suite

Apply consistent code formatting across all integration and E2E test
files. These changes improve readability without modifying test behavior
or coverage. The formatting follows project rustfmt configuration.

Formatting changes applied to all test files:
- Reorder imports alphabetically (std::io before std::process)
- Break long assertion messages onto multiple lines for readability
- Expand multi-parameter function calls to one argument per line
- Format serde_json::from_str() chains with explicit line breaks
- Align chained method calls vertically
- Expand boolean expressions in assertions to use || at line start

Specific file changes:

tests/agent_exit_codes.rs:
- Format stdin.write_all() error handling
- Expand assert! with multi-condition checks
- Multi-line test input strings where appropriate

tests/agent_hook_output.rs:
- Format JSON parsing chains consistently
- Expand assert! messages for clarity
- Align assertion parameter formatting

tests/agent_json_format.rs:
- Format all serde_json::from_str() calls
- Expand assert_eq! with decision comparisons
- Multi-line array formatting for command lists

tests/cli_e2e.rs:
- Format long command argument arrays
- Expand scan command invocations

tests/config_toggles_e2e.rs:
- Format configuration struct instantiation
- Expand assertion chains

tests/regression_heredoc_masking.rs:
- Format evaluate_command() calls with wrapped arguments

tests/regression_path_anchors.rs:
- Multi-line assertion formatting
- Consistent whitespace in test bodies

tests/repro_redirection_bypass.rs:
- Format assertion messages for bypass tests
- Consistent blank line usage

tests/scan_extractor_integration.rs:
- Format extractor function calls
- Expand long test assertions

tests/suggest_allowlist_e2e.rs:
- Format suggestion validation assertions

tests/tui_e2e.rs:
- Format terminal simulation setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
